text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You want to play card games with me? Sorry, but
I ain't really got time for babysittin' damsels.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe, oh come now. That won't be the case!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
In the name of training my spirit even further, I
simply want to compete with one of the
academy's most competitive spirits!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Geez. Well you've got a good eye, I'll give you
that.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: And El? Why are you here?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I mean, I was just passin' by at first!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Couldn't help myself after hearin' about a fresh
new competition. The world's strongest has no
choice but to compete with the best!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
All these Horsegirl are so pushy these days. Never
know when to pipe down.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If we're going to do this, then go to the store and
bring back some hard candies.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Yeah, we'll use them instead of chips today.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and make sure to get the minty ones. I can't
stand anything too sweet.
